calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2021 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Aug-12-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for further Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Rockstar Hotels, Inc., a Florida corporation, Rockstar Hotels, LIC, Inc., a Florida corporation, RSHG Talent, Inc., a Florida corporation, and Robert Santucci, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Michael A. Wallin, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Sheppard, Mullin, Richter & Hampton, LLP, a California limited partnership.
Terri Foster, Revenue Controller for plaintiff Sheppard, Mullin, Richter & Hampton, LLP, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Foster and Mr. Wallin appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Rockstar Hotels, Inc., a Florida corporation, Rockstar Hotels, LIC, Inc., a Florida corporation, RSHG Talent, Inc., a Florida corporation, and Robert Santucci, an individual.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Account Stated and Unjust Enrichment was filed on December 3, 2019.
Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint for Breach of Contract, Account Stated and Unjust Enrichment was filed on January 28, 2020.
Substitute service of plaintiff's First Amended Summons, First Amended Complaint and accompanying documents on defendants Rockstar Hotels, Inc., a Florida corporation, Rockstar Hotels, LIC, Inc., a Florida corporation, RSHG Talent, Inc., a Florida corporation, and Robert Santucci, an individual, occurred on March 7, 2020, and was effectuated as to all four defendants on July 25, 2020.
Default as to all four defendants was entered on October 14, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 16, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Sheppard, Mullin, Richter & Hampton, LLP, a California limited partnership, and against the defaulted defendants Rockstar Hotels, Inc., a Florida corporation, Rockstar Hotels, LIC, Inc., a Florida corporation, RSHG Talent, Inc., a Florida corporation, and Robert Santucci, an individual, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $191,137.45. (Amount pled in plaintiff's first amended complaint)
Prejudgment Interest - $23,640.10.
Costs - $435.00.
Total - $215,212.55.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
